message.content:
@startuml
skinparam classAttributeIconSize 0
skinparam classFontColor black
skinparam classBackgroundColor white
skinparam classBorderColor black
skinparam classHeaderBackgroundColor #f0f0f0
skinparam classHeaderFontColor black
skinparam classHeaderBorderColor black
skinparam classHeaderBorderThickness 1
skinparam classHeaderAlignment left
skinparam classAttributeFontColor black
skinparam classMethodFontColor black
skinparam classAttributeIconSize 0
skinparam classMethodIconSize 0
skinparam classAttributeIconSize 0
skinparam classMethodIconSize 0
skinparam classAttributeIconSize 0
skinparam classMethodIconSize 0

class CheckTestUI {
}

class CheckTestController {
  + TestStore testStore
  + ClientStore clientStore
  + AuthFacade authFacade
  + List<Test> clientTestList
  + Client client
  + getClientTests()
  + getTestReport(String idTest)
}

class Company {
  + TestStore testStore
  + ClientStore clientStore
  + getTestStore()
  + getClientStore()
}

class ClientStore {
  + List<Client> clientList
  + getClientFromEmail(String email)
}

class TestStore {
  + List<Test> testList
  + getTestList()
}

class TestMapper {
  + toDto(testList, client)
}

class TestDTO {
  + toDto(testList, client)
}

class Client {
  + String tin
  + getTin()
}

class Test {
  + String idTest
  + TestReport testReport
  + getTestReport()
}

CheckTestUI ..> CheckTestController
CheckTestController ..> Company
CheckTestController ..> ClientStore
CheckTestController ..> TestStore
CheckTestController ..> TestMapper
CheckTestController ..> TestDTO
CheckTestController ..> Test
Company "1" -- "*" ClientStore : uses
Company "1" -- "*" TestStore : uses
ClientStore "1" -- "*" Client : knows
TestStore "1" -- "*" Test : knows
TestMapper ..> TestDTO
CheckTestUI ..> TestDTO

@enduml
